summary: Navigation and PHI protection improvements for SP and FRM users, along with enhancements to Patient Tracking and Patient Profile.

updates.title: PHI Protection on Tasks
updates.body: The Task Description field is now masked for users in the FRM role, ensuring sensitive patient health information is protected.

updates.title: Consent Status & HCO Columns in Patient Tracking
updates.body: Consent Status and HCO columns and filters are now available in Patient Tracking.

updates.title: Status Detail Column Default Visibility
updates.body: The Status Detail column now defaults to visible in the Patient Profile > Status History view.

updates.title: Share Modal Warning
updates.body: A warning is now shown when a saved filter includes the Watch filter, helping prevent unintended sharing behavior.

updates.title: Sortable Latest Referral Date Column
updates.body: The "Latest Referral Date" column in Patient Tracking is now sortable when a payer filter is active.

updates.title: Days Pending Column Accuracy
updates.body: The Days Pending column now shows correct values for patients in Pending status.

updates.title: SP User Navigation
updates.body: Specialty Pharmacy users can now navigate from the Patient Tracking list to Patient Services without encountering a 403 error.
